message:
fix(engine): versioned rewrite pack — validate interference metadata against actual pack rules

The cross-interference check (metadata_matches_pair) previously only validated
that rule target strings syntactically referenced the correct pack IDs, but did
not verify that the referenced rule IDs actually existed in those packs. This
could silently accept interference entries pointing to nonexistent rules.

Changes:
- New rule_target_rule_id_for_pack helper extracts the rule ID portion from
  a "pack_id:rule_id" target string (replacing the bool-only check)
- metadata_matches_pair now takes &self to access pack data, builds BTreeSets
  of actual rule IDs for both packs, and validates that each interference
  entry's rule references exist in the corresponding pack
- Refactored rule_target_matches_pack to delegate to the new helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
